item.title: JNJ Stock Rises As Drugmaker Reportedly Eyes Orthopedics Segment Sale For Up To $20B
item.description: Bloomberg reported, citing people familiar with the matter, that DePuy Synthes could be valued at more than $20 billion in a sale.

item.title: CORT Stock Drops After Appeals Court Sides With Teva In Korlym Patent Fight
item.description: The ruling pertains to Corcept’s Korlym tablets for the treatment of Cushing syndrome.

item.title: JPMorgan Says CEO Dimon ‘Fraudulently’ Included In Trump’s $5B Lawsuit, Seeks To Move Jurisdiction
item.description: In a court filing on Thursday, JPMorgan Chase moved to transfer the lawsuit to a federal court in Miami from the Florida state court.

item.title: Netflix Could Hike Offer For WBD If Rival Bidder Paramount Does: Report
item.description: Reuters on Thursday reported, citing people familiar with the matter, that Netflix has ample cash and could hike its offer if Paramount Skydance ups i...

item.title: Minneapolis Fed President Says White House Is Trying To Compromise The Central Bank’s Independence: Report
item.description: According to a Financial Times report, Kashkari said on Thursday that the Fed was trying to ignore political turbulence and instead focus on its dual ...
